allow: Bash(cmd //c "where node & where npm & where npx & where python & where py")
Bash(zip -r site.zip index.html kampanya.html urunler.html quiz.html css/ js/)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded)

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force; "killed pid $\($p.OwningProcess\)" } else { "port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; "port freed")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; $env:PORT = '3000'; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\\Users\\Sinan\\Desktop\\Hackathon\\serve.ps1' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).StatusCode)

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "done")

Bash(powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('site.zip'\).Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize")
